title: Peltastes peltatus
taxonomy: Peltastes peltatus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Peltastes. This genus is part of the subfamily Ruschioideae, which is a subfamily within the family Aizoaceae. The plant is native to South Africa. It is a succulent plant that thrives in arid environments.
